display_information.name: KortixDev
display_information.description: Your AI workforce, in Slack — @-mention an agent and it does the real work.
display_information.long_description:
Kortix is the AI command center for your company — your agents, integrations, automations, and memory in one place, with a workforce of AI agents that does real work across your tools, around the clock. This app brings that workforce into Slack.

Invite the bot to a channel, @-mention it with a task, and an agent gets on it: working across your connected tools and replying in the thread as it goes. Follow-ups stay in the same conversation — Kortix keeps the full context.

*What it can do*
• Research, search your tools, and summarize threads or documents
• Pull data, analyze it, and drop reports, decks, and CSVs back into the thread
• Draft replies, docs, and updates — then post them or hand them off
• Run multi-step work across thousands of connected integrations
• Kick off and check on automations that run on a schedule or a trigger
• Read repos, edit files, and open PRs too — when that's the job

*A few things teammates ask it*
• `@Kortix pull yesterday's sign-ups, group them by source, and drop the CSV here`
• `@Kortix summarize this thread and draft a reply to the customer`
• `@Kortix build me a one-pager on our Q2 numbers`
• `@Kortix what changed across our tools this week?`

Connect a Kortix project once, then talk to Kortix like you'd talk to anyone else on the team. No slash commands. No copy-paste. Just @-mention and reply.

*AI Disclaimer*
Kortix uses AI to generate responses and perform tasks. While we strive for accuracy, AI-generated content may occasionally contain errors. Review important outputs before acting on them.

Managed by Kortix · https://kortix.com

slash_commands.description: Manage your Kortix project from Slack
